steps.title: Identify cause and effect
steps.content: The first sentence describes a world where breathable air is owned and sold by companies. The next sentence says people must buy it with O2 credits. Buying air is the consequence of companies owning and selling it.

steps.title: Reject other transitions
steps.content: Choice B suggests a shift like 'whatever the case,' Choice C signals contrast, and Choice D signals an earlier time. The sentence needs a result transition linking the fictional system to what people must do. The answer is A.
